narrative: US-Iran military escalation and hot inflation data drive a broad USD bid as equities slide — DXY +0.03%; gold lower -1.03% near $4,091; equities -1.62%; VIX 22.2. USD/JPY tests the 160.51 intervention threshold, supported by a 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage and positive US economic surprises. EUR/USD holds at 1.1550 ahead of today's ECB meeting, where a +300bp nominal disadvantage vs the Fed persists. Watch ECB Rate Decision at 12:15 UTC and US PPI tomorrow.
